---
title: "Murakaza neza"

theme: flatly

about:
  template: jolla
  image: DSCN1502.jpg
  links:
    - icon: Email
      text: Email
      href: mailto:isimbi1@stolaf.edu
---


My name is Isimbi Mutoni Henriette. Fun fact ; I am from Rwanda and Murakaza neza means welcome in Kinyarwanda, our national language. I am a senior majoring in Biology at St Olaf college. I hope to pursue a research career in genetics or immunology. Our genetic and immune system amaze me, therefore, I would like to learn more about them and how they can be used to fight diseases. I currently do molecular research on Tetrahymena *thermophila*, here at St Olaf college. if you are interested to learn more about my research, feel free to send me an email :)
